mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT user_number, user_id, user_name, user_nickname, user_phone, user_email FROM ddd_user WHERE user_type = 'C' AND USER_STATUS = 'black' ORDER BY user_number DESC ) WHERE rownum <= 5
SELECT COUNT(user_number) FROM ddd_user WHERE user_type = 'C' AND USER_STATUS ='black'
SELECT COUNT(user_number) FROM ddd_user WHERE user_type ='C' AND USER_STATUS ='black' AND user_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
SELECT COUNT(user_number) FROM ddd_user WHERE user_type = 'C' AND USER_STATUS ='black' AND user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT user_number, user_id, user_name, user_nickname, user_phone, user_email FROM ddd_user WHERE user_type = 'C' AND USER_STATUS = 'black' ORDER BY user_number DESC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT user_number, user_id, user_name, user_nickname, user_phone, user_email FROM ddd_user WHERE user_type = 'C' AND USER_STATUS = 'black' AND user_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY user_number DESC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT user_number, user_id, user_name, user_nickname, user_phone, user_email FROM ddd_user WHERE user_type = 'C' AND USER_STATUS = 'black' AND user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY user_number DESC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT u.user_number ,u.user_id, u.user_nickname, u.user_name, u.user_birth, u.user_phone, u.user_email, (SELECT LISTAGG(report_reason, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY report_number) FROM ddd_report WHERE reported_user_number = u.user_number ) AS report_reason FROM ddd_user u WHERE u.user_number = #{userNumber}
mapper.update: UPDATE ddd_user SET USER_STATUS = 'kind' WHERE USER_STATUS = 'black' AND user_number = #{userNumber}
